case_title: KARI MCCORMICK VS. THE DOCUMENT COMPANY INC,. A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCORMICK, KARI AS TO DEFENDANT THE DOCUMENT COMPANY INC,. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
